MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Petition To Determine Heirship And/Or Right To Inherit
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Benetatos (Trustee). Charles Tunnell for Rhoda Cummings (Executor of the Boyd Estate).

The Petition to Determine Heirship and/or Right to Inherit was referred to the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) for trial setting (order for the same signed in open Court). If the Parties are interested in having a settlement conference with Pang Li (Court Settlement Officer), they are to contact the Courtroom Clerk.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Heirship And/Or Right To Inherit
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Continued To Aug-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Tunnell for Rhoda Cummings. George Benetatos (Trustee) and for George Efthymiou.

Mr. Benetatos reported that the parties are close to settling, have agreed to use a percentage rather than a dollar amount, and require an appraisal of the unit. Mr. Tunnell reported that they have not agreed to use Mr. Benetato's appraiser but might look into an independent appraiser who has not previously worked for either party. The Court firmly stated that appraisals are to be completed before August 20, 2013 and both parties acknowledge this request. The Petition to Determine Heirship and/or Right to Inherit was continued to August 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition To Determine Heirship And/Or Right To Inherit
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Continued To May-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Tunnell for Rhoda Cummings.

Mr. Tunnell stated that he was expecting Mr. Benetatos to be here and that Mr. Benetatos expressed to him that his client is motivated to settle but they are not there yet. The petition to determine heirship was continued to May 21, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the parties have not settled by then, the Court will send this matter to Dept. 206 to obtain a trial date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Notice Of Petition And Petition For Nullity Of Void Marriage
Off Calendar Apr-05-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Tunnell for Rhoda Cummings (Executor of Boyd Estate). George Benetatos (Trustee) in propria persona.

The Court stated that the petition is in order, that it can be granted, that the death certificate lists the decedent as married, and that the petiton makes no request with regard to the death certificate. Mr. Benetatos stated that the he has investigated that issue, that once the Court's order is signed he will take it to Sacramento, that an amended death certificate will be issued at that point, and that they can then proceed with trying to sell the property in Greece. The Court granted the Petiton for Nullity of Void Marriage (subject to review of the order). Mr. Tunnell stated that they would need additional time to complete the mediation, that Mr. Benetatos is waiting for medical records, and that they are still trying to engage in settlement discussions. Mr. Bentatos stated that his client is in Greece, that his client doesn't speak English, and that it has been a problem/delay. The Court extended the deadline for mediation on the Petition to Determine Heirship 60 days and continued the May 3, 2011 status on mediation to June 21, 2011. The Court directed Counsel to contact the Examiner in advance of the next hearing date if the matter settles.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Notice Of Petition And Petition For Nullity Of Void Marriage
Off Calendar Mar-23-2011 Continued To Mar-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Heirship And/Or Right To Inherit
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Continued To May-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Petition And Petition For Nullity Of Void Marriage
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Continued To Mar-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Tunnell for Rhoda Cummings. Marlene Getchell for George Benetatos.

Ms. Getchell stated that Mr. Benetatos was in trial, that Mr. Tunnell's Client signed the death certificate indicating that Ms. Dialina was married and that they needed a corrected death certificate to be presented to the Greek authorities so that the Nephew could inherit the property. Mr. Tunnell stated that he was asked by Ms. Getchell to stipulate to the above but that he has no information to allow his Client to stipulate and likewise he has no information to refute it (marriage issue). In addition, Mr. Tunnell stated that he will not file opposition and that he would leave it up to the Court to make a determination. Counsel also spoke of Arhtur Boyd's Estate which is being probated in Marin County. The Petition for Nullity of Void Marriage was continued to March 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to do research and consider argument presented. Status of mediation on the Petition to Determine Heirship was continued from February 16, 2011 to May 3, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Bloom.

Respondent George G Benetatos Motion To Strike Petition To Determine Heirship And/Or Right To Inherit Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Marlene P Getchell Attorney
Off Calendar Nov-19-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Tunnell for Rhoda Cummings (Executor of the Arthur Boyd Estate). Marlene Getchell for Geroge Benetatos (Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Demurrer is overruled. The Motion to Strike is denied. The Court stated that it has jurisdiction over the Trust but no jurisdiction as to the will and the Estate. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 9, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 14, 2011. The Petition to Determine Heirship was continued and a status conference is set for February 16, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Tunnell will prepare the order with regard to the motions.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
